summary: Diagnose low cache-hit performance and redesign prompt layout for stable cache prefixes.

inputs.name: workflow_name
inputs.description: API path or workflow being optimized.

inputs.name: sample_prompts
inputs.description: At least three representative prompt payloads.

inputs.name: latency_and_token_metrics
inputs.description: Optional before-state metrics for impact calculation.

outputs.name: anti_pattern_report
outputs.description: Current cache-breaking patterns in prompt assembly.

outputs.name: revised_prompt_layout
outputs.description: Before/after prompt structure optimized for cache reuse.

outputs.name: validation_plan
outputs.description: Measurable checks for hit ratio, latency, and token improvements.

workflow_steps: Inspect prompt payloads and identify immutable prefix candidates.
Locate unstable fields currently inserted in cache prefix regions.
Design cache-safe prompt layout with stable top-level instruction blocks.
Define quantitative validation checks for post-change performance.

verification.smoke_test: Analyze a high-traffic workflow and verify output contains anti-patterns, revised template, and measurable success criteria.
